domain: Filipino Bayanihan (Filipino community house-moving tradition; 15-30 villagers lift entire bahay kubo stilt-house using bamboo poles; phase-locked step cadence synchronizes across carriers; asymmetric load distribution — center poles heavier than periphery; post-task communal feast bonds contributors; structure twists/breaks if phase desync; bayan = town/community)
specific_mechanism: BAYANIHAN-LIFT: phase-locked collective gradient-step coordination for distributed LLM training with asymmetric load + anti-twist + consolidation. (1) M workers each compute local gradient g_i. (2) Phase-coherence: workers synchronize update-phase via shared cadence-token c_t broadcast every K steps; all workers commit gradient simultaneously at cadence-tick. (3) Asymmetric weights w_i: central workers (high-importance shard) receive larger update weight; periphery smaller. (4) Anti-twist structural-integrity constraint: combined gradient W·g satisfies max-eigenvalue λ ≤ λ_struct (prevents structural rotation of weight matrix). (5) Post-task feast: small-LR consolidation round after major sync events that bonds workers via shared low-amplitude reconciliation.
llm_application: BAYANIHAN-LIFT distributed-training phase-locked cadence + asymmetric worker weights + anti-twist constraint + consolidation feast. Differs from GAC 2603.01501 (gradient alignment control for async LLM RL — different — no cadence + asymmetric + anti-twist). Distributed Training LLM Rohan Paul (general distributed training pipelines — no specific cadence + asymmetric). Compression-Aware Gradient Splitting (compression for AllReduce — no anti-twist constraint). Efficient Distributed Survey 2407.20018 (distributed training survey — no cadence-token + asymmetric + anti-twist). Differs from R426 HAKA-PHASE-LOCK (RoPE-phase reset, not distributed gradient), R447 MBUTI-HOCKET-DECODE (modulo-K speculative decoder), R452 HAENYEO-PHASE (multi-expert dive-surface pool) by EXPLICIT DISTRIBUTED-WORKER CADENCE-TOKEN + ASYMMETRIC LOAD + ANTI-TWIST λ-BOUND.
novelty_claim: GAC + Distributed Training + Compression-Aware + Efficient Distributed Survey cover synchronized distributed gradient training. BAYANIHAN-LIFT adds (a) explicit cadence-token broadcast for phase-coherence + (b) asymmetric center-periphery worker weights + (c) anti-twist structural-integrity λ-bound + (d) consolidation feast round. Recombination — distributed training + weighted gradients are mainstream.
